pr.title: gr cleanup, internal ID fixes/additions, part 1
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Broad stage/ground cleanup: renamed many gr callback-table functions to role-based names, corrected and filled out InternalStageId values, changed StageData's first field from a misleading flags field to internal_stage_id, and updated stage data initializers plus mpLib/camera/fighter call sites to use the real internal stage IDs. It also folded grheal.static.h into grheal.c, synchronized GALE01 symbols/scratches, and produced one new match in gricemt.

key_files.role: Expanded and renamed InternalStageId values, replacing several STAGEKIND_UNK entries with named stages such as TEST, KINOKOROUTE, PUSHON, target-test stages, HEAL, and FIGURE1-3.
Renamed StageData.flags1 to internal_stage_id and callback0/callback1 to OnInit/OnDemoInit.
Switched StageData calls to OnInit/OnDemoInit and renamed Ground_801C1074 to Ground_DemoInit.
Updated demo initialization call site to use Ground_DemoInit.
Rekeyed mpLib_803BF248 entries from unknown/numeric internal stage IDs to the newly named enum constants.
Representative callback-table cleanup: BATTLE StageData ID, OnInit/OnDemoInit/OnLoad/OnStart/OnTouchLine/OnCheckShadowRender names, isDemoFight sbss name, and GET_GROUND/GET_JOBJ cleanup.
Moved static data, callbacks, StageData, and string data out of grheal.static.h into the C file; StageData now uses HEAL.
Deleted static header after its contents were folded into grheal.c.
grIceMt_801F8A34 gained missing state writes and reached 100% according to the bot report.
Changed floor/eye-bound switch cases from SHRINEROUTE to KINOKOROUTE where they call grShrineRoute_802087B0.
Replaced unknown stage-kind cases with named SHRINEROUTE and PUSHON and included gr/forward.h.
Synchronized symbol names for Ground_DemoInit, callback role names, fn_ to gr-prefixed names, and isDemoFight.
Updated grFigureGet scratch name to grFigureGet_OnInit.

what_changed: Renamed stage lifecycle and callback-table functions across many gr files based on their callback slots, with examples including grBattle_OnInit, grBattle_OnDemoInit, grFigureGet_OnLoad, grStadium_OnTouchLine, and grKraid_OnCheckShadowRender.

Expanded InternalStageId in src/melee/gr/forward.h: InternalStageID_Unk01 became TEST, route/special IDs such as KINOKOROUTE, ZEBESROUTE, BIGBLUEROUTE, BATTLE, LAST, FIGUREGET, PUSHON, target-test IDs, HEAL, HOMERUN, FIGURE1, FIGURE2, and FIGURE3 were named, and STAGEKIND_UNK32 through STAGEKIND_UNK39 were removed.

Changed StageData's first field from flags1 to internal_stage_id and replaced many numeric or bitmask-looking initializers with enum constants such as CASTLE, BATTLE, MUTECITY, PSTADIUM, HEAL, TEST, and target-test IDs.
Renamed StageData callback0/callback1 fields to OnInit/OnDemoInit and updated ground.c to call those fields directly.
Renamed Ground_801C1074 to Ground_DemoInit in symbols, ground.c, ground.h, and the Stage_8022532C call site.
Updated mpLib_803BF248 from a mix of InternalStageID_Unk, STAGEKIND_UNK, and numeric IDs to named InternalStageId constants.

Fixed call sites that depended on internal stage IDs: camera.c uses KINOKOROUTE instead of SHRINEROUTE for the grShrineRoute floor/eye-bound cases, ftCo_Bury.c uses SHRINEROUTE and PUSHON instead of unknown IDs, and grkongo.c compares against TEST instead of InternalStageID_Unk01.
Deleted grheal.static.h and moved its static arrays, StageCallbacks, StageData grHeal_803E84C4, and message string into grheal.c.

Applied local cleanup in multiple gr files by using GET_GROUND and GET_JOBJ, replacing raw gobj->user_data and gobj->hsd_obj access, removing dummy stack padding in several functions, and cleaning some OSReport/HSD_ASSERT usage.
Synchronized config/GALE01/symbols.txt and scratches.txt with source renames, including grFigureGet_OnInit, Ground_DemoInit, grFigureGet_80219B10, grLast_8021A9AC, and isDemoFight.
grIceMt_801F8A34 was completed by adding gp->gv.icemt2.xC4 = 0.0f and gp->x11_flags.b012 = 2 after animation/collision setup.
smart_moves: Used the stage callback table as naming evidence, so role names like OnInit, OnDemoInit, OnLoad, OnStart, OnTouchLine, and OnCheckShadowRender are grounded in table position instead of guessed behavior.
Renamed the StageData field before mass-updating initializers, making it explicit that the first word is an internal stage ID and not a flags bitmask.
Updated enum definitions, StageData initializers, mpLib mapping, and downstream switch/case users in the same PR, reducing the risk of internal ID drift.
Kept GALE01 symbols and scratches synchronized with source-level renames, which preserves searchability and decomp tooling alignment.
Moved grheal static definitions out of a .static.h include and into the owning C file, improving ownership and reducing header clutter.
Small matching-oriented cleanups used typed accessors and removed fake stack artifacts without overexplaining weakly known functions.
The grIceMt_801F8A34 fix was minimal and state-focused: it added the missing fields needed for the match instead of rewriting the function broadly.
decomp_lessons: For stage modules, callback-table position is strong evidence for lifecycle names; prefer gr<Stage>_OnInit, OnDemoInit, OnLoad, and OnStart over address-derived names or UnkStage0 placeholders when the StageData table proves the role.
Do not treat StageData's first initializer as flags just because old values look like bitmasks; this PR establishes it as internal_stage_id.
When naming internal stage IDs, update every dependent table and call site together, especially mpLib stage tables and gameplay/camera switch statements.
If an enum is still partly unknown, preserve explicit unknown names such as InternalStageID_Unk35 rather than inventing a stage name.
Prefer GET_GROUND and GET_JOBJ with local Ground* and HSD_JObj* variables over raw user_data/hsd_obj access; it often removes dummy stack padding and clarifies matching intent.
Static stage data belongs in the C file unless there is a proven cross-file need; .static.h includes can obscure symbol ownership.
Address-derived fn_ names can be improved safely to module-prefixed address names, as with grFigureGet_80219B10 and grLast_8021A9AC, when no semantic name is proven yet.
Config symbol/scratch renames should accompany source renames in the same change to keep tooling and search results consistent.
naming_conventions: Stage callback role pattern: gr<Stage>_OnInit, gr<Stage>_OnDemoInit, gr<Stage>_OnLoad, gr<Stage>_OnStart.
Stage collision/render callback role pattern: gr<Stage>_OnTouchLine and gr<Stage>_OnCheckShadowRender.
InternalStageId additions in this PR use all-caps known stage constants such as TEST, BATTLE, FIGUREGET, PUSHON, HEAL, and target-test constants like TCAPTAIN and TZELDA.
Route stage constants named in this slice include KINOKOROUTE, SHRINEROUTE, ZEBESROUTE, and BIGBLUEROUTE.
Unknown internal IDs should remain visibly unknown, e.g. InternalStageID_Unk35.
StageData field names should reflect callback role: internal_stage_id, OnInit, OnDemoInit, OnLoad, OnStart.
Use descriptive local/static names when evidence exists, e.g. grNBa_804D6AC8 became isDemoFight.
When semantics are not known, prefer module-prefixed address names over bare fn_ names, e.g. grFigureGet_80219B10 and grLast_8021A9AC.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Bot evidence: GALE01 matched code became 56.21% (+0.01%, +212 bytes) with one new match, main/melee/gr/gricemt grIceMt_801F8A34 from 83.74% to 100.00%.
grIceMt_801F8A34 matched after adding two missing state writes, gp->gv.icemt2.xC4 = 0.0f and gp->x11_flags.b012 = 2, and removing an unused local.
Using GET_GROUND/GET_JOBJ and typed HSD_JObj* locals can remove artificial u8 padding arrays and raw casts while preserving or improving codegen.
Renaming symbols and callbacks is non-codegen by itself, but it makes callback-table matching and future scratch searches much easier.
Replacing misleading numeric StageData IDs with enum constants is a data/typing match tactic: it prevents future code from forcing fake flag expressions to match data.

review_feedback.feedback: No human review comments or reviews were present in this PR slice.
GALE01 report showed matched code 56.21% (+0.01%, +212 bytes) and one new match: main/melee/gr/gricemt grIceMt_801F8A34, +35 bytes, 83.74% to 100.00%.

follow_up_queries: Search for remaining StageData first initializers that are numeric literals or bitmask expressions instead of InternalStageId constants.
Search for remaining STAGEKIND_UNK or InternalStageID_Unk names in gr, mp, camera, and fighter code.
Search for UnkStage0_OnLoad and UnkStage0_OnStart callbacks not covered by this part 1 cleanup.
Audit InternalStageID_Unk35 to determine whether it has enough evidence for a real stage name.
Verify every InternalStageId enum value has the correct mpLib_803BF248 mapping and expected StageData initializer.
Search gr files for raw gobj->user_data and gobj->hsd_obj accesses that could become GET_GROUND or GET_JOBJ.
Continue callback-role naming for stage files not touched in this PR, reusing the OnInit/OnDemoInit/OnLoad/OnStart naming convention.
